journal_entry.reason: Record payment for digital marketing campaign with recoverable HST. Advertising is expensed per IAS 38.69. The $22,000 payment includes $2,530.97 HST (recoverable input tax credit) and $19,469.03 advertising expense.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Mondelez paid $22,000 cash inclusive of 13% HST for a digital marketing campaign. Under IAS 38.69, advertising and promotional expenditure must be expensed when incurred. The $22,000 includes recoverable HST. Base amount = 22,000 / 1.13 = $19,469.03. HST = $2,530.97. The HST is recoverable (input tax credit) and recorded as a tax asset. The advertising expense is the net amount of $19,469.03. Cash decreases by the total paid of $22,000.
